name: init
description: Initialize a new paper trading account with a name, base currency, and starting balance. Use this first before any other trading commands. The account must be created before opening positions or logging snapshots.

name: snapshot
description: Log a market snapshot for a symbol to enable unrealized PnL tracking. Use this to record current prices for open positions. Required for the status command to calculate unrealized PnL. The mint parameter is required for identifying the specific asset.

mint.description: Token contract address (required for DEX tokens like WETH, WBTC/cbBTC)

name: open
description: Open a new long or short position with specified quantity, entry price, and risk management levels. Use this to start tracking a new trade. Supports stop-loss and take-profit levels along with maximum risk percentage.

mint.description: Token contract address (required for DEX tokens)

max-risk-pct.description: Maximum risk as percentage of account balance

name: set_levels
description: Update stop-loss and take-profit levels for an existing position. Use this to adjust risk management as the trade evolves. If multiple positions exist for the same symbol, use mint to target the correct one.

mint.description: Token contract address (required if multiple positions share same symbol)

name: close
description: Close (or partially close) an existing position at a specified price. Use this to realize profits or losses. The qty parameter allows partial closes. If multiple positions exist for the same symbol, use mint to target the correct one.

mint.description: Token contract address (required if multiple positions share same symbol)

qty.description: Quantity to close (use full qty for full close, less for partial)

name: note
description: Add a journal note with optional tags for a specific position. Use this to record thesis updates, risk assessments, or macro observations. Notes are stored as immutable events for later review.

tags.description: Tags for categorization (e.g., thesis, risk, macro)

name: status
description: Show current portfolio status including open positions, realized PnL, and unrealized PnL. Use this to check your current exposure. Unrealized PnL requires prior snapshots. Supports JSON output with optional pretty printing.

name: review
description: Generate a weekly performance summary including trade statistics, win rate, and PnL breakdown. Use this at the end of each week to review performance. Supports JSON output with optional pretty printing.
